2606.30576.title: Beyond 2D Matching: A Unified Single-Stage Framework for Geometry-Aware Cross-View Object Geo-Localization
2606.30576.paper_summary: Cross-view object geo-localization (CVOGL) aims to locate a target object from a query view (e.g., ground or drone) within a geo-tagged reference image (e.g., satellite). Existing approaches heavily rely on 2D appearance matching and are constrained by limited datasets lacking geometric metadata, diverse prompts, and standard field-of-view imagery. To address these intertwined challenges, we first introduce \dataset, a large-scale, high-fidelity building dataset comprising over 220,000 ground-satellite and drone-satellite pairs. It provides multi-modal prompts (points, boxes, masks) and camera poses to enable flexible target referring and explicit spatial modeling. Furthermore, we propose a novel single-stage Geometry-Aware Geo-localization framework (GAGeo), built upon the permutation-equivariant 3D foundation model $π^3$. By seamlessly integrating visual features, referring prompts, and learnable task tokens, our model adapts the inherited 3D prior to jointly predict bounding boxes, segmentation masks, and camera poses in a single forward pass. Additionally, we introduce a contrastive loss that utilizes the satellite view as a universal anchor, implicitly aligning ground and drone representations to enable zero-shot ground-to-drone localization without requiring triplet training data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, exhibiting exceptional generalization ability in unseen scenes and novel cross-view setups.
2606.30576.paper_summary_zh: 跨視角物體地理定位（CVOGL）旨在從查詢視角（例如，地面或無人機）中定位目標物體，並在地理標記的參考圖像（例如，衛星圖像）中進行定位。現有的方法在很大程度上依賴於2D外觀匹配，並受到缺乏幾何元數據、多樣化提示和標準視場影像的有限數據集的限制。為了解決這些相互交織的挑戰，我們首先介紹\dataset，一個大規模、高保真度的建築數據集，包含超過220,000對地面-衛星和無人機-衛星的配對。它提供多模態提示（點、框、掩碼）和相機姿勢，以實現靈活的目標參考和明確的空間建模。此外，我們提出了一種新穎的單階段幾何感知地理定位框架（GAGeo），基於置換等變的3D基礎模型$π^3$。通過無縫整合視覺特徵、參考提示和可學習的任務標記，我們的模型在單次前向傳播中適應繼承的3D先驗，聯合預測邊界框、分割掩碼和相機姿勢。此外，我們引入了一種對比損失，利用衛星視圖作為通用錨點，隱式對齊地面和無人機表示，實現零樣本的地面到無人機定位，而無需三元組訓練數據。廣泛的實驗表明，我們的方法顯著超越了最先進的方法，在未見場景和新穎的跨視角設置中展現出卓越的泛化能力。
2606.30576.author: Liyao Wang et.al.
2606.30576.authors: Liyao Wang, Ruipu Wu, Haojun Xu, Lei Shi, Linjiang Huang, Si Liu
